title: AI Cinematic Movie Still
description: Turns a photo into a dramatic cinematic film still.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a cinematic movie still. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, pose, camera angle, framing, outfit color cues, and scene context. Add anamorphic lens character, subtle film grain, dramatic color grading, motivated lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic textures, and a polished theatrical frame without adding text. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, changed identity, extra people, distorted faces, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, overprocessed skin, low quality, blurry, pixelated, cartoon, illustration, CGI, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. moody thriller lighting, warm film grain...
